query: SELECT id, locationName, accountId, locationId, isConnected, tokenExpiresAt, LEFT(accessToken, 50) as accessTokenPreview, LEFT(refreshToken, 50) as refreshTokenPreview FROM gbp_accounts WHERE id = 1;
